name: 截短霰弹枪 | 径流
descriptionEn: The classic Sawed-Off deals very heavy close-range damage, but with its low accuracy, high spread and slow rate of fire, you'd better kill what you hit. Parts of this Sawed-Off have been lightly color case-hardened through the application of wood charcoal at high temperatures. A \"brown shotgun\" with a twist
descriptionZh: 经典的截短霰弹枪拥有强大的近距离杀伤力，但同时也有着低精准，高散布和低射速的特点，你最好能迅速解决掉你击中的“地方”。 截短霰弹枪局部木炭高温淬火。 “棕色喷子”的叛逆变奏
